text: The gentle hush of this modern hallway fills me with quiet anticipation. As I wander into the vivid, knowledge-rich R+D exhibit, I feel invigorated by the celebration of inquiry and innovation. There is a sense of endless potential here, as if each question—posed or unspoken—is a stepping stone on an infinite path. Curiosity pulses in my chest, transforming uncertainty into a vibrant, hopeful energy.
